mini_task_spec:
In the file `test-repo/packages/core/metadata-scanner.ts`, the `MetadataScanner` class contains several public methods. Using symbol-lookup tools to find all public methods of the `MetadataScanner` class in `test-repo/packages/core/`, identify each method by name and determine the exact start line (1-based) of its signature declaration and the end line (1-based) of its closing brace `}`.

Report results in this exact format, one method per line, sorted by start line:

```
methodName: startLine-endLine
```

For example: `exampleMethod: 10-25`
